title: Potential of sorghum and millet production in Sudan
abstract:
Sudan is the largest country in Africa, covers an area of 2.5 million sq. kms., equivalent to 250 million 
hactares. The cultivated area amounts to seven million
hectares. However, conservative estimates are that about
35 million hactares is suitable for crop production, 60
million hectare, for range land and 30 million hectares for
forests...
